sideEffectsSummarySql:
-- Side-effects summary for stress run: bulk-create-locations-burst-2026-04-18T19-18-01-989Z
-- Run via: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f - <<'EOF'

select 'external_sync_events' as table_name, count(*)::text as cnt
  from external_sync_events
  where correlation_id like 'bulk-create-locations-burst-2026-04-18T19-18-01-989Z%'
     or metadata->>'stress_run_id' = 'bulk-create-locations-burst-2026-04-18T19-18-01-989Z'
union all
select 'warehouse_inventory_activity', count(*)::text
  from warehouse_inventory_activity
  where correlation_id like 'bulk-create-locations-burst-2026-04-18T19-18-01-989Z%'
     or metadata->>'stress_run_id' = 'bulk-create-locations-burst-2026-04-18T19-18-01-989Z'
union all
select 'warehouse_review_queue', count(*)::text
  from warehouse_review_queue
  where group_key like 'stress:bulk-create-locations-burst-2026-04-18T19-18-01-989Z:%'
     or metadata->>'stress_run_id' = 'bulk-create-locations-burst-2026-04-18T19-18-01-989Z'
union all
select 'webhook_events', count(*)::text
  from webhook_events
  where external_webhook_id like 'bulk-create-locations-burst-2026-04-18T19-18-01-989Z%'
union all
select 'warehouse_locations', count(*)::text
  from warehouse_locations
  where name like 'TEST-bulk-create-locations-burst-2026-04-18T19-18-01-989Z-%';

-- EOF
notes: Dry run — would call createLocationRange(prefix='TEST-bulk-create-locations-burst-2026-04-18T19-18-01-989Z-BURST', fromIndex=1, toIndex=50); expect mode='trigger' (>30 entries).
